title: FREE PHONE DROP for First 500 SHS Enrollees!
excerpt: SPIST is not playing this SY 2026–2027! Sa FIRST 500 incoming SHS enrollees na officially ENROLLED ay may chance kang mag-uwi ng BRAND NEW PHONE. Enroll na bago maubusan ng slots! Exclusively for SPIST Anabu Main Campus enrollees only.

title: 2026 SPIST Graduation and Moving Up Ceremonies
excerpt: SPISTIAN KLASMEYTS, YOUR MOST-AWAITED DAY IS FINALLY HERE! SHS Anabu: May 5 at Dasmariñas City Arena. Basic Education: May 6 at Fynn Boutique Hotel, Bacoor. NKP & Grade 6 (8AM–12NN), Grade 10 (1PM–5PM).

title: 🏀 VICTORY FOR SPIST! 🏆
excerpt: The SPIST Men's College Team (22 Under Division) delivered an impressive performance as they dominated STI Bacoor with a commanding 96–65 victory during the Inter School Basketball League – 20th Season.
